attempts.warning: Picard self-inclusion or contraction bound fails on at least one tail substep

note: Full theorem-suite benchmarks remain a local/CI research check; this artifact embeds a representative certificate and latest parameter-box summary.

public_change_summary.detail: The visible page, certificate, manifest, and branch line-ending policy are tied to one build provenance record.
public_change_summary.detail_ko: 보이는 페이지, certificate, manifest, 브랜치 line-ending 정책이 하나의 빌드 출처 기록에 묶여 있습니다.
public_change_summary.title: Commit-pinned build

public_change_summary.detail: Picard, Poincare, permutation, section, and stride gates are verified as one claim set.
public_change_summary.detail_ko: Picard, Poincare, permutation, section, stride gate를 하나의 주장 묶음으로 검증합니다.
public_change_summary.title: Scientific gate profile

public_change_summary.detail: The public profile fixes upper bounds for invariant drift and Picard contraction.
public_change_summary.detail_ko: 공개 profile은 보존량 drift와 Picard 수축의 상한을 고정합니다.
public_change_summary.title: Bounded numerical drift

public_change_summary.detail: The active certificate profile and canonical descriptor digest must both match verifier expectations; CLI and threebody_engine callers share the same public verifier shortcut.
public_change_summary.detail_ko: 활성 certificate profile과 canonical descriptor digest가 verifier 기대값과 일치해야 합니다. CLI와 threebody_engine 호출자는 같은 공개 verifier shortcut을 씁니다.
public_change_summary.title: Active profile digest

approaches.interpretation: Final row of the sampled deterministic ephemeris.
Compact target solver deterministic r_i(t) readout.
Mean of the pushed-forward uncertainty ensemble.

success_report.interpretation: Success means the random-case point forecast agrees with a stricter reference integration inside success_tolerance while invariant drift and close-approach diagnostics remain within configured gates.

target_distribution_quality.interpretation: Mean standard errors estimate Monte Carlo sampling uncertainty of the empirical target-position mean, not the physical spread of the predicted positions.

decision_reasons: no configured diagnostic blocks the selected readout
target_readout_decision.question_answered: Given masses, initial positions, initial velocities, and target time t, which target-time position statement is defensible?

target_sensitivity_budget.interpretation: This local budget compares the variationally propagated target-position standard deviation against the declared position_tolerance. It is a finite-time numerical predictability certificate for the supplied initial uncertainty model, not a global closed-form solution.

recent_change_ledger.detail: A seeded arbitrary initial state is generated and four readouts are compared against a stricter reference integration.
recent_change_ledger.detail_ko: seed가 고정된 임의 초기조건을 만들고 네 가지 판독값을 더 엄격한 기준 적분과 비교합니다.
recent_change_ledger.title: Random target demo

recent_change_ledger.detail: The operational answer remains a finite-time flow-map coordinate when resolved, otherwise a pushed-forward probability law.
recent_change_ledger.detail_ko: 해상 가능한 경우 유한시간 flow-map 좌표를 답하고, 그렇지 않으면 밀어낸 확률법칙을 답합니다.
recent_change_ledger.title: Position or distribution

recent_change_ledger.detail: The global analytic discussion is kept separate from the practical finite-time solver and does not claim an elementary formula.
recent_change_ledger.detail_ko: 전역 해석 논의는 실용적인 유한시간 solver와 분리하며 초등함수 공식을 주장하지 않습니다.
recent_change_ledger.title: Sundman route scoped

recent_change_ledger.detail: The target answer payload and public Pages artifact bundle are digest-pinned for reproducible external review.
recent_change_ledger.detail_ko: 목표 답변 payload와 public Pages artifact bundle을 digest로 고정해 외부 재현 검토가 가능하게 합니다.
recent_change_ledger.title: Certificate validation

target_distribution_quality.interpretation: Mean standard errors estimate Monte Carlo sampling uncertainty of the empirical target-position mean, not the physical spread of the predicted positions.

probability.interval_note: Distance intervals are conservative bounds from marginal coordinate q05/q95 boxes, not exact pair-distance quantiles.

target_prediction_certificate.reproducibility_statement: The target answer is tied to this input contract and solver/uncertainty parameter set; recompute with the same contract to audit the reported target positions and distribution.

decision_reasons: no configured diagnostic blocks the selected readout
target_readout_decision.question_answered: Given masses, initial positions, initial velocities, and target time t, which target-time position statement is defensible?

target_sensitivity_budget.interpretation: This local budget compares the variationally propagated target-position standard deviation against the declared position_tolerance. It is a finite-time numerical predictability certificate for the supplied initial uncertainty model, not a global closed-form solution.
